headline: Down 17.4% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why The Cooper Companies (COO) Looks Ripe for a Turnaround
summary: The Cooper Companies (COO) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
